description: Train vanilla RL agents against full opponent spectrum [0.0-1.0], test cross-game generalization. Tests H8: game-specific convergence vs generalization trade-offs.

training_opponents.description: Full spectrum: discrete uniform distribution over [0.0, 1.0]
training_opponents.note: At each epoch, opponents sampled randomly from this distribution

test_opponents.description: 5 representative types matching fine-grained experiment midpoints
test_opponents.note: Midpoints of opponent ranges from generalization matrix experiment

test_conditions.within_task: Test on training game (less informative given full-spectrum training, included for completeness)
test_conditions.note: Each test involves all 3 games × 5 opponent types = 15 test conditions per trained agent

network_config.note: Vanilla RL only (no ToM auxiliary tasks)

opponent_sampling.description: Each epoch, sample opponents randomly from full distribution

hypothesis_testing.H8: Agents trained against entire population display averaged behavior

predictions.PD: Fast convergence to optimal defection policy, poor generalization
predictions.SH: Slower convergence, higher policy entropy, better generalization

testing.description: 15 trained agents × 15 test conditions (3 games × 5 opponents)
